Pickle Tests

The module pickle_tests is a class responsible for testing the pickling the preprocessed HARPS and ESPRESSO dataset.

class pickle_tests.TestPickles(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: TestCase

Unit tests for the unpickle_data function.

test_data_loading(mock_file)[source]

Tests successful loading of data from the pickle file.

test_eof_error(mock_file)[source]

Tests that EOFError is raised for an empty or improperly formatted file.

test_file_not_found(mock_file)[source]

Tests that FileNotFoundError is raised when the file does not exist.

test_generic_exception(mock_file)[source]

Tests that a generic exception is raised for other issues during loading.

L98-59 Tests

The module test_l98_59 is a class responsible for testing the L98-59 model.

class l9859_tests.TestL9859(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: TestCase

Unit tests for the L98-59 model class, ensuring that initialization and settings are correctly applied and verifying the behavior of its setup.

setUp(mock_load_data)[source]

Set up method for test cases. Initialises the L9859Analysis with specific parameters before each test.

Parameters:

mock_load_data (unittest.mock.patch) – Patch for the load_data method to prevent actual data loading during initialization.

test_compute_planets_RV(mock_params, mock_rv_model)[source]

Test the computation of radial velocities (RV) using the radvel model with mocked parameters and RV model.

test_derive_params()[source]

Test the derivation of eccentricity parameters based on the given values of secosw and sesinw for planets b, c, and d.

test_init()[source]

Test the initialization of the L9859Analysis class to ensure all properties are set as expected.

test_initialise_parameters_default()[source]

Test the initialization of parameters with all additional features (planet B, FWHM, S-index) turned off. This test verifies the base parameter setup without extensions.

test_initialise_parameters_full()[source]

Test the initialization of parameters with all additional features (planet B, FWHM, S-index) turned on. This test verifies the complete parameter setup including extensions.

test_load_data(mock_unpickle_data)[source]

Test successful data loading to ensure data structures are correctly initialised and populated with data from the unpickle process.

Parameters:

mock_unpickle_data (unittest.mock.patch) – Mock of the unpickle_data function, set to return a predefined dataset.

test_load_data_failure(mock_unpickle_data)[source]

Test the error handling of the data loading process when the data file is missing, expecting an IOError.

Parameters:

mock_unpickle_data (unittest.mock.patch) – Mock of the unpickle_data function, set to raise an IOError.

test_mean_fxn()[source]

Test the mean_fxn method to ensure it correctly computes mean functions for RV, FWHM, and Sindex based on the provided time and parameter vector.

test_myloglike()[source]

Test the myloglike method to evaluate the log likelihood calculation for the given parameter vector.

test_myprior(mock_gaussian, mock_jeffreys, mock_uniform)[source]

Test the myprior function to ensure proper application of parameter priors across different parameter types.

test_planet_prior(mock_uniform, mock_kipping_beta, mock_gaussian)[source]

Test the planet_prior function to ensure it correctly transforms parameters using the specified prior distributions.
